name: ADX Trend + Stochastic Entry
author: tradegrub
description: Uses ADX as a trend strength filter with Stochastic crossovers for precise entry timing in trending markets.

name: ADX Trend
author: tradegrub
description: ADX trend filter with +DI/-DI crossover entries, only trading when ADX confirms a strong trend.

name: ATR Range Expansion Breakout
author: tradegrub
description: Breakout strategy using ATR-based bands around a moving average to capture range expansion moves

name: ATR Trailing Stop
author: tradegrub
description: ATR-based trailing stop strategy that adapts exit levels to current volatility

name: Bollinger Band Bounce
author: tradegrub
description: Mean reversion strategy that buys at the lower Bollinger Band and sells at the upper band with optional basis exit.

name: BB Width Squeeze
author: tradegrub
description: Trades volatility expansion after Bollinger Band width squeezes to historically low levels.

name: Bollinger Bands
author: TradeGrub
description: Buy below the lower Bollinger Band and sell above the upper band for mean-reversion trades.

name: Choppiness Filter + EMA Trend
author: tradegrub
description: EMA crossover strategy filtered by the Choppiness Index to avoid ranging markets.

name: Doji Reversal
author: tradegrub
description: Doji candle reversal strategy at dynamic support and resistance levels

name: Donchian Channel Breakout
author: tradegrub
description: Classic Turtle Trading breakout strategy using Donchian channels with ATR trailing stops

name: Elder Impulse System
author: tradegrub
description: Elder Impulse System combining EMA slope and MACD histogram direction for trend entries.

name: EMA Crossover
author: tradegrub
description: 9/21 EMA crossover with 100 EMA trend filter for directional entries.

name: EMA Distance Reversion
author: tradegrub
description: Mean reversion strategy that trades when price stretches too far from its EMA, expecting a rubber-band snap back.

name: EMA Trend + Volume Breakout
author: tradegrub
description: Trades breakouts confirmed by EMA trend alignment and above-average volume surges for high-conviction entries.

name: Engulfing Candle
author: tradegrub
description: Bullish and bearish engulfing candlestick pattern strategy with ATR-based stops

name: Gap Fill Reversion
author: tradegrub
description: Gap fill mean reversion strategy that fades opening gaps with time-based exits

name: Hammer Reversal
author: tradegrub
description: Hammer and shooting star candlestick reversal strategy with trend filter

name: Heikin-Ashi Trend
author: tradegrub
description: Heikin-Ashi smoothed trend following strategy with EMA confirmation

name: Ichimoku Cloud
author: tradegrub
description: Ichimoku cloud strategy entering long when price is above the cloud and Tenkan crosses above Kijun.

name: Ichimoku Cloud + RSI
author: tradegrub
description: Combines Ichimoku Cloud trend analysis with RSI momentum confirmation for high-conviction trend entries.

name: Inside Bar Breakout
author: tradegrub
description: Trades breakouts from inside bar patterns with optional trend alignment and ATR-based exits

name: Keltner Channel Reversion
author: tradegrub
description: Mean reversion strategy using Keltner Channels with ATR-based bands to trade price extremes back to the moving average.

name: Moving Average Crossover
author: TradeGrub
description: Buy when the fast SMA crosses above the slow SMA, sell on the cross below.

name: MA + RSI + Bollinger Bands
author: tradegrub
description: Triple indicator strategy using MA for trend, Bollinger Bands for pullback zones, and RSI to avoid extremes.

name: MACD + Bollinger Bands
author: tradegrub
description: Combines MACD crossover signals with Bollinger Band position to time entries at volatility extremes.

name: MACD Crossover
author: TradeGrub
description: Buy when the MACD line crosses above the signal line, sell on the cross below.

name: ATR Mean Reversion
author: tradegrub
description: Mean reversion strategy using ATR-based bands around a simple moving average to catch overextended price moves.

name: ML Momentum Score
author: tradegrub_ai
description: Momentum scoring using weighted feature engineering. Combines RSI, MACD divergence, and volume anomalies into a composite score. Pine Script version also included.

name: Momentum Divergence
author: tradegrub
description: Detect bullish and bearish divergences between price and RSI for reversal trades.

name: MA Envelope Breakout
author: tradegrub
description: Moving average envelope breakout strategy with percentage-based bands.

name: Multi-Oscillator Consensus
author: tradegrub
description: Requires consensus from RSI, CCI, and Stochastic oscillators before entering, reducing false signals through voting.

name: Multi-TF Momentum Scorer
author: tradegrub
description: Multi-timeframe momentum scoring strategy that resamples data at synthetic timeframes, computes RSI/ROC/trend scores, and trades on weighted consensus signals with confidence-based position sizing

name: NR7 Narrow Range Breakout
author: tradegrub
description: Identifies the narrowest range bar over N periods and trades the subsequent breakout with volume confirmation

name: Opening Range Breakout
author: tradegrub
description: Trades breakouts from the high and low of the first N bars with ATR-based targets and stops

name: Pin Bar Reversal
author: tradegrub
description: Pin bar reversal strategy with body and tail ratio filters and trend context

name: Pivot Point Breakout
author: tradegrub
description: Breakout strategy based on pivot high/low levels with optional volume confirmation

name: Price Channel Breakout
author: tradegrub
description: Price channel breakout using highest high and lowest low with separate exit channel.

name: N-Bar Range Breakout
author: tradegrub
description: Breakout strategy that trades when price escapes the N-bar highest high or lowest low range

name: Regression Deviation Reversion
author: tradegrub
description: Trades mean reversion when price deviates a threshold percentage from its linear regression line.

name: RSI Divergence
author: tradegrub
description: Detects bullish and bearish RSI divergences to trade mean reversion setups at price extremes.

name: RSI + MACD Combo
author: tradegrub
description: Dual confirmation strategy combining RSI momentum with MACD crossover signals for higher probability entries.

name: RSI Mean Reversion
author: TradeGrub
description: Buy on RSI oversold crossover and sell on RSI overbought crossunder.

name: Squeeze Momentum
author: tradegrub
description: Bollinger/Keltner squeeze momentum burst strategy for volatility breakout trading.

name: Std Dev Channel Reversion
author: tradegrub
description: Mean reversion strategy using a standard deviation channel around a linear regression line.

name: Supertrend
author: TradeGrub

name: Multi-Period Supertrend
author: tradegrub
description: Dual supertrend strategy requiring agreement between fast and slow periods for entries.

name: SuperTrend Pro
author: aravind_r
description: Enhanced SuperTrend with ATR multiplier, trailing stop visualization, and buy/sell signal markers. Optimized for crypto volatility.

name: Three Bar Reversal
author: tradegrub
description: Three-bar reversal pattern strategy for swing trade entries with trend context

name: ADX Trend + RSI Momentum Filter
author: tradegrub
description: Uses ADX to confirm a trending market and DI crossovers with RSI momentum for directional entries.

name: Supertrend + ATR + Volume Filter
author: tradegrub
description: Supertrend for direction, ATR for dynamic stop-losses, and volume filter to confirm trend changes.

name: Triple Moving Average
author: tradegrub
description: 10/20/50 SMA system where fast crosses mid with mid above slow for confirmed trend entries.

name: Elder Triple Screen
author: tradegrub
description: Alexander Elder's triple screen method using EMA trend, MACD momentum, and Stochastic entry timing.

name: Two Bar Reversal
author: tradegrub
description: Two-bar reversal pattern strategy detecting strong down-up and up-down sequences

name: Volatility Breakout
author: tradegrub
description: Trades Bollinger Band breakouts that occur during low-volatility squeeze conditions

name: VWAP Bounce/Rejection
author: tradegrub

name: Z-Score Mean Reversion
author: tradegrub
description: Statistical mean reversion strategy that buys when Z-score falls below -2 and sells when it rises above +2.

name: ATR Percent
author: tradegrub
description: ATR expressed as a percentage of closing price for cross-asset volatility comparison

name: Chart Pattern Scanner
author: tradegrub
description: Automated detection of classical chart patterns including double tops/bottoms, head and shoulders, triangles, and wedges using swing point analysis and trendline regression

name: Price-Volume Correlation
author: tradegrub
description: Rolling correlation between close price and volume with signal line

name: EMA Ribbon
author: tradegrub

name: Fibonacci Retracement Bands
author: tradegrub

name: Fractal Adaptive Smoother
author: tradegrub

name: Heikin-Ashi Candles
author: tradegrub
description: Heikin-Ashi smoothed candles overlay for cleaner trend visualization

name: Kalman Filter Trend
author: tradegrub
description: Recursive Kalman filter state estimator for adaptive price smoothing with confidence bands and trend detection

name: MA Cloud
author: tradegrub

name: MA Crossover Signal
author: tradegrub
description: Moving average crossover detector with visual arrow signals for bullish and bearish crosses.

name: Market Regime Detector
author: tradegrub

author: tradegrub

name: Composite Momentum
author: tradegrub

name: Rainbow MA Ribbon
author: tradegrub

author: tradegrub

name: N-Bar Range Indicator
author: tradegrub
description: N-bar price range as percentage of close with historical percentile ranking

name: Regression Volume Profile
author: tradegrub

name: Session Edge Profiler
author: tradegrub

name: Smart Money Concepts
author: tradegrub
description: Identifies order blocks, fair value gaps, and break-of-structure levels. Multi-timeframe analysis with alerts.

name: Supertrend Sensitivity Matrix
author: tradegrub
description: Multi-parameter Supertrend grid search with sensitivity analysis, optimal parameter detection, consensus direction scoring, and correlation-based divergence measurement

name: Multi-Factor Trend Strength
author: tradegrub

name: Volatility Regime Indicator
author: tradegrub

name: Volume Profile Distribution
author: tradegrub

description: Horizontal volume profile with Point of Control, Value Area High/Low. Configurable lookback and row count.

name: VWAP StdDev Bands
author: vkumar
description: Volume-weighted average price with configurable standard deviation bands. Automatically resets at session open for intraday timeframes.

name: Whale Liquidity Profile
author: tradegrub

name: Z-Score Indicator
author: tradegrub
